name: Slow Cooker White Beans with Sage/Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the beans and enough cold water to cover by 2 inches. Let stand at room temperature overnight.
2. Drain well and place in a slow cooker. Add the garlic, sage, and enough cold water to cover by 2 inches.
3. Cover and cook until the beans are just tender, 6 to 7 hours on low.
4. During the last 30 minutes of cooking, stir in the salt. If necessary, drain the beans.
5. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature, drizzled with olive oil.
